OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The token of the user who represents the connector in the OpenCTI platform.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope defines the set of entity types that the enrichment connector is allowed to process.

CONNECTOR_TYPE.description: Should always be set to INTERNAL_ENRICHMENT for this connector.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: Determines the verbosity of the logs.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Enables or disables automatic enrichment of observables for OpenCTI.

PROOFPOINT_ET_INTELLIGENCE_API_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the ProofPoint ET Intelligence API.

PROOFPOINT_ET_INTELLIGENCE_API_KEY.description: API key used to authenticate requests to the ProofPoint ET Intelligence service.

PROOFPOINT_ET_INTELLIGENCE_MAX_TLP.description: Maximum Traffic Light Protocol (TLP) level for observables to be enriched.

PROOFPOINT_ET_INTELLIGENCE_IMPORT_LAST_S.description: ISO 8601 duration defining the time window for importing last seen data (e.g., P30D for 30 days).
